hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */gen/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"This file is under gen/ and is generated (sqlc/oapi-codegen). Do not hand-edit it. Change the source (backend/db/queries/*.sql or api/openapi.yaml) and regenerate instead."}}';; *) ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *backend/*.go) gf="$(command -v gofmt 2>/dev/null || true)"; [ -z "$gf" ] && [ -x /usr/local/go/bin/gofmt ] && gf=/usr/local/go/bin/gofmt; [ -n "$gf" ] && "$gf" -w "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
